pi_items.source: Task description line: 'Create a Taxonomy Vocabulary named 'File Formats' (machine name: file_formats)'. Follows standard Drupal naming conventions (lowercase, underscores). Confirmed in export_result.sh line 17 and verifier.py line 38-42.

Task description line: 'with terms: PDF, ePub, MOBI'. These are standard digital file format names. ePub capitalization is correct (official name). Confirmed in verifier.py line 20, 59-60 which normalizes to lowercase for comparison.

Task description line: 'Create a Product Variation Type named 'Digital Variation' (machine name: digital_variation)'. Follows Drupal Commerce naming convention. Confirmed in export_result.sh line 25 checking 'commerce_product.commerce_product_variation_type.digital_variation'.

Task description line: 'Create a Product Type named 'Digital Product' (machine name: digital_product)'. Confirmed in export_result.sh line 33 checking 'commerce_product.commerce_product_type.digital_product'.

Task description line: 'Add a File field to the Digital Variation type named 'Download File' (machine name: field_download_file)'. Follows Drupal field naming convention (field_ prefix). Confirmed in export_result.sh line 42 checking 'field.field.commerce_product_variation.digital_variation.field_download_file'.

Task description line: 'Add an Entity Reference field to the Digital Variation type named 'File Format' (machine name: field_file_format)'. Follows Drupal field naming convention. Confirmed in export_result.sh line 43 checking 'field.field.commerce_product_variation.digital_variation.field_file_format'.

privileged_info_summary: Task architect_digital_products@1 is a Drupal Commerce configuration benchmark task. The agent is expected to create: (1) a taxonomy vocabulary with machine name 'file_formats' containing three terms: PDF, ePub, and MOBI; (2) a non-shippable product variation type named 'digital_variation' with a file field 'field_download_file' and an entity reference field 'field_file_format'; and (3) a product type 'digital_product' using the digital_variation type. The data is synthetic, generated through interactive UI manipulation of a containerized Drupal Commerce environment. All metadata values match the explicit task specification and are verified against the verifier and export scripts.
